        "type": "invariant",
        "source_assumption_id": null,
        "source_invariant_id": "SG-008/INV-002",
        "source_threat_id": "stride-008",

          "is_boundary_edge": true
        },

          "classification": "internal-only",
          "entry_points": [
            "Internal"

          "attacker_controlled": false,
          "validation_layers": [
            "System transaction construction"
          ],
          "bug_bounty_scope": "in-scope",
          "notes": "If system transaction gas is not fixed, a lower value could cause system contracts to fail due to insufficient gas, while a higher value wastes resources."
        },
        "exploitability": "internal-bug",
        "severity": "MEDIUM",
        "severity_justification": "Incorrect gas allocation could cause system contract failures (too low) or resource waste (too high).",
        "bug_bounty_eligible": true,
        "bug_bounty_notes": "Must demonstrate system transaction executing with gas != 30,000,000."
